untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a pre-stationarized time series as input (e.g., detrended price, residuals, or a normalized indicator). The ALLOWED INDICATORS list does not include stationarity-transformed series or custom pre-processed indicators. The signal cannot be expressed using only raw price/volume/technical indicators without access to the underlying stationarity transformation.
translation_notes: The core logic (threshold crossing at 60th percentile) is translatable, but it assumes the 'close' price has already been stationarized externally. Used 'close' as a placeholder for the stationary series and threshold value of 60 from parameters. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT because the signal generates both long (crosses_above) and short (crosses_below) signals from the same threshold rule.
